title: [Workflow] Raise external event from workflow context
body:
This convenience method allows a Workflow author to raise an event directly to another workflow Instance, without having to go via an Activity. This would also work well for cross-workflow event raising.

This is a convenience method that did exist in the original DurableTask, [but was descoped from Dapr Workflows several releases ago.](https://github.com/dapr/dapr/issues/8243)

Now Workflows are a lot more mature, it makes sense to bring this convenience method back into all SDKs and runtime.
